text:
(CME) 

VALUES: Null/missing =Not Enrolled in Medicare Part C 
01 = Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) 
02 = HMO point-of-service (HMOPOS) 
04 = Local Preferred Provider Organization (PPO) 
05 = PSO (State License) 
06 = PSO (Federal Waiver of State License) 
07 = Medical Savings Account (MSA) 
08 = Religious Fraternal Benefit (RFB) private fee-for-service (PFFS) plan 
09 = Private fee-for-service (PFFS) plan 
10 = SHMO 
18 = Section 1876 Cost Plan 
19 = HCPP — Section 1833 Cost Plan
